title: Enchantment Evolution
description: An Immersive Modpack that adds many more crazy ENCHANTMENTS!!!
body:
# 🧙‍♂️ Green’s Ultimate Enchantment Evolution — Total Enchantment Control - Version: Fabric 1.21.1 - Theme: Magical mastery, gear customization, and visual flair - Playstyle: Solo & SMP-friendly - Status: First release — more enchantments and features coming soon! ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ ## ✨ What Is Enchantment Evolution? Enchantment Evolution is a modpack **_built for players who want full control over their gear_**. Say goodbye to RNG and hello to precision: choose your enchantments, merge the impossible, and build legendary weapons with style. Whether you're a dungeon raider, PvP tactician, or builder with flair, this pack gives you the tools to enchant your world. ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ # 🔥 Core Features ## 🧩 Enchantment Overhaul Neo Enchant+ — Adds 25+ enchantments like Blink, Gravity, Happy Boost, Explosive Arrow, and Curse of Clumsiness BeyondEnchant — Breaks vanilla limits with enchantments like Efficiency X, Looting V, Unbreaking X, and more Enchants Plus — Adds 18 enchantments and 4 curses like Crab’s Touch, Wind Charge, Lava Walker, Light Aura, and Websnare Dungeons and Taverns — Adds RPG-style enchantments like Ghasted, Traveler, Photosynthesis, and Illager’s Bane ## 🛠️ Utility & Control Enchanting Infuser — Choose your enchantments directly, no randomness. Advanced infuser lets you modify and repair gear Easy Disenchanting — Transfer enchantments from gear to books using just an anvil Merge Enchantments — Combine normally incompatible enchantments like Silk Touch + Fortune Enchantment Descriptions — See clear tooltips for every enchantment, including modded ones ## 🎨 Visual & UI Enhancements Xali’s Enchanted Books — Every enchanted book has a unique texture based on type and level Fresh Animations — Mobs move with lifelike animations, from zombies to villagers Recolourful Containers — Custom GUIs for crafting tables, enchanting tables, barrels, and more 🧪 Performance & Tools VulkanMod — Replaces Minecraft’s renderer with Vulkan for smoother performance JEI (Just Enough Items) — View recipes, uses, and crafting guides instantly ## 🧠 Why This Modpack Rocks 💥 Over 70+ new enchantments across weapons, armor, tools, and elytras 🧬 Full control over enchantment selection, merging, and removal 🎨 Immersive visuals and animated mobs for a cinematic experience ⚙️ Optimized for Fabric 1.21.1 with performance boosts and mod compatibility ## 🚀 What’s Next? Future updates will include: New enchantment tiers and rarities Custom loot tables and dungeon drops Enchantment-based progression system Optional questline and boss mechanics ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- **Try Out my other Modpacks and More!!! [Coming More Soon!!]** -
Craft Reversal
[A datapack that lets you uncraft Items that you crafted by mistake and take back you'r valuables.] -
Green's Better MC
[A Modpack that will improve your world and experience and add tonnes of new biomes, features, mobs and optimization.] -
Bloodthirsty
[A Thriller to tear your heart and bring you nitghtmares. A Bloody Horror Modpack.] -
Enchantment Evolution
[An Immersive Modpack that adds many more crazy ENCHANTMENTS!!!]
